Career Opportunity
Fiber Optics Engineer
Qualifications:
B.Sc., M.Sc., or Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering, Optics, Engineering Physics, or Telecommunications
Education in fiber optics and bulk optics would be an asset
Knowledge of high-precision optical alignment
Experience in state-of-the-art fiber optic components and fiber optic instruments
Experience in testing and characterization of fiber optic components

Key Responsibilities:
Work closely in the areas of product development in the fiber optics components research and development
Send your resume to: info@o-eland.com Attn: Human Ressources


Please do not call regarding your resume. We only contact candidates who are selected. The present page does not mean that there is currently an opening.
